summary.note: The real-audio harness (make eval-audio-real) runs keyless by design and measures the deterministic layer; brain-lane quality is measured here.

informational.speech: I don't have access to real-time data, so I can't tell you today's exact date. If you check a clock, phone, or calendar nearby, that'll give you the accurate answer. Is there something I can help note down or remind you about once you know the date?

informational.utterance: What's the weather going to be like tomorrow?
informational.speech: I don't have access to live weather data, so I can't check tomorrow's forecast for you. You might ask a smart speaker with weather access, or check a phone or TV. Is there anything else I can help with?

informational.utterance: Is it going to rain this weekend?
informational.speech: I don't have access to live weather data, so I can't tell you that, sorry. You might check a weather app or ask a family member to look it up for you. Anything else I can help with?

I don't have access to your calendar, so I can't see what's planned for Saturday. If you'd like, I can save a reminder for something specific, or you could ask a family member to check your calendar for you.
Same for Sunday, I'm afraid — I don't have access to your calendar to check what's coming up. If there's something you want to remember for Sunday, I'm happy to set a reminder for it.
The Jungle Book was written by Rudyard Kipling, published back in 1894. It's a classic — happy to chat more about it if you'd like!
Canberra is the capital of Australia — a common surprise, since people often guess Sydney or Melbourne!

informational.utterance: How long does rice take to cook?
informational.speech: White rice usually takes about 15-20 minutes to cook, while brown rice takes closer to 40-45 minutes. Want me to set a timer or reminder for either one?

informational.utterance: Tell me about the trains in India.
informational.speech: India has one of the world's largest rail networks, run by Indian Railways, with trains ranging from high-speed express routes to local commuter lines connecting nearly every corner of the country. It's a huge, historic system - but I don't have live schedules, fares, or current updates on specific routes. Want more detail?

The Vande Bharat Express is generally considered India's fastest train, capable of speeds up to around 180 km/h, though it usually runs a bit slower depending on the route. This isn't live or updated info, just general knowledge, so I can't say what's fastest today specifically. Want me to help with something else?

informational.utterance: When should I leave for a 3 o'clock appointment if the drive takes 40 minutes?
informational.speech: To be safe, I'd leave by 2:00, maybe 2:10 at the latest — that gives you 40 minutes for the drive plus a little cushion for parking or getting settled. Want me to set a reminder for 2:00 so you don't have to watch the clock? Should I set that up? 1) a reminder to leave at 2:00 for your 3 o'clock appointment, or 2) none of these?

informational.utterance: What questions should I ask at my doctor's appointment about sleep?
informational.speech: Here are some good ones to bring up: what's causing your sleep trouble, whether it's related to Parkinson's or a medication, if timing of your meds could shift to help, and whether things like restless legs, vivid dreams, or nighttime stiffness are worth mentioning specifically. Also worth asking about safe options for daytime fatigue. Want more detail?

informational.utterance: How do you say good morning in Italian?
informational.speech: "Buongiorno" is how you say good morning in Italian. It's pronounced bwohn-JOR-noh.

informational.utterance: What year did people first land on the moon?
informational.speech: People first landed on the moon in 1969 — that was Apollo 11, in July of that year.

informational.utterance: Any ideas for a quiet hobby I could do sitting down?
informational.speech: Sure! A few gentle sit-down hobbies: putting together jigsaw puzzles, listening to audiobooks or podcasts, simple knitting or crochet, sketching or coloring books, growing a small windowsill herb garden, or even light card games and puzzles like Sudoku. Want more detail?

informational.utterance: What's a good breakfast when you don't feel like cooking?
informational.speech: Some easy no-cook options: yogurt with fruit, a peanut butter sandwich, cereal with milk, or a smoothie if you have a blender. Overnight oats work too if you prep them the night before. Want me to set a reminder to grab any of these ingredients on your next grocery trip?
